title: Prohibitions
doc_html:
§2155.  Prohibitions

No person shall dispose of solid waste in violation of this Subtitle, the regulations of the secretary, or a permit or order issued by the secretary.

Acts 1983, No. 97, §1, eff. Feb. 1, 1984.

§2155.  Prohibitions
